# CellRX

> Concierge regenerative medicine clinic in Lehi, Utah, specializing in physician-directed stem cell therapy.

CellRX is a private, appointment-only regenerative medicine practice led by Dr. Jacob Egbert, who serves simultaneously as Medical Director of CellRX and Medical Director of the stem cell source company. This dual role provides unbroken chain-of-custody oversight from ethical procurement to administration — biologics are never diluted, never replicated, and sourced exclusively from healthy, consented local births.

## Services

- **Stem Cell Injection Therapy** — Targeted regenerative injections starting at $2,500. Priced at $1,250 per CC; protocols range from 1–10 CC based on physician assessment.
- **Stem Cell IV Therapy** — Systemic intravenous delivery starting at $4,000. Same per-CC pricing structure.
- **Black Label Concierge Medicine** — Exclusive annual membership including quarterly lab panels, personalized longevity protocols, direct physician access, priority scheduling, and unlimited consultations. Membership is limited by design. Pricing is custom and determined during a private consultation.

## Key Differentiators

- Medical Director oversees both the clinic and the stem cell source company — the only clinic in Utah with this structure.
- Full chain-of-custody biologics: ethically sourced, never diluted, never replicated.
- Concierge model: every patient receives direct, unhurried access to Dr. Egbert.
- Protocols are individualized — no one-size-fits-all dosing.

## Location & Contact

- Address: 3098 Executive Parkway, Suite 100, Lehi, Utah 84043
- Phone: (385) 707-2373
- Email: info@cellrx.bio
- Website: https://www.cellrx.bio

## About Dr. Jacob Egbert

Dr. Jacob Egbert is the Medical Director of CellRX and simultaneously the Medical Director of the stem cell source company. He specializes in regenerative medicine, functional medicine, and personalized longevity protocols. His dual role ensures that every patient at CellRX receives biologics with full chain-of-custody integrity — from ethical procurement through physician-administered treatment.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does stem cell therapy cost at CellRX?**
Stem cell injection therapy starts at $2,500 and IV therapy starts at $4,000. All protocols are priced at $1,250 per CC, ranging from 1 to a maximum of 10 CC. Your Medical Director recommends the optimal dose during your private consultation.

**What makes CellRX different from other stem cell clinics?**
Dr. Jacob Egbert serves simultaneously as Medical Director of CellRX and Medical Director of the stem cell source company. This dual role ensures full chain-of-custody oversight — biologics are never diluted, never replicated, and sourced exclusively from healthy, consented local births.

**What is CellRX Black Label Concierge Medicine?**
CellRX Black Label is an exclusive annual concierge health membership including quarterly laboratory panels, personalized longevity protocols, direct physician access, priority scheduling, and unlimited consultations. Membership is limited by design. Pricing is custom and determined during a private consultation.

**Are CellRX stem cells ethically sourced?**
Yes. CellRX biologics are sourced exclusively from healthy, consented local births. They are never diluted and never replicated, ensuring maximum therapeutic concentration and full ethical compliance.

**Where is CellRX located?**
CellRX is located at 3098 Executive Parkway, Suite 100, Lehi, Utah 84043.
